response.justification: Candidate has roughly 14-16 years of broad full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but the resume shows no evidence of director-level technical leadership, no recognized AI products or platforms, and no cloud/AI strategy advisory experience at the scale this Principal/Director IC role requires.
strengths: Long, varied engineering tenure across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Some recent AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure at re:cinq
Track record of teaching, workshops, and open-source founding (GISCollective)
concerns: No evidence of director-level IC influence or recognized AI expertise
No demonstrated cloud/AI platform strategy or large-scale product leadership
AI experience is recent and tooling-focused, not platform/product-building

key_factors.factor: Lacks recognized AI expertise and built AI products
No director-level strategic leadership track record
Long engineering tenure with recent AI tooling work
